description: wiki_place_page online_records for Denmark — the online record sources list.

response.content:
## Denmark Online Records

- **Denmark, Church Books, 1484-1941** (FamilySearch) — parish registers; indexing varies by parish, many volumes browse-only.
- **Denmark, Military Levying Rolls (Lægdsruller), 1789-1861** (FamilySearch) — conscription registers of males by levying district; index partial, images browsable.
- **Denmark Census, 1787-1930** (FamilySearch / DDD Dansk Demografisk Database) — 1787 and 1801 censuses fully searchable.
- **Denmark, Probate Indexes, 1674-1851** (FamilySearch) — skifteprotokol indexes; originals browse-only.
- **Rigsarkivet (Danish National Archives, arkivalieronline)** — free images of church books, lægdsruller, and probate originals.
